X-CSRF-Header.name: X-CSRF-Header
X-CSRF-Header.description: Required CSRF header for any KeplerService. *Note: Actual string value does not matter*.

federatedInstanceName.name: federatedInstanceName
federatedInstanceName.description: The name of the Federated Instance to read

clientID.name: clientID
clientID.description: The ClientID of the OAuth2 Client to read.

name.name: name
name.description: The name of the Provider Type

groupID.name: groupID
groupID.description: The Artifact ID of the user group.

includeMetadata.name: includeMetadata
includeMetadata.description: A Boolean value indicating whether to return extended group metadata in the response.

includeActions.name: includeActions
includeActions.description: A Boolean value indicating whether to return a list of operations available to the user for this user group.

queryToken.name: queryToken
queryToken.description: Search Query Token, obtained from the Query Result.

permissionID.name: permissionID
permissionID.description: ID of the Permission to Read.

workspaceID.name: workspaceID
workspaceID.description: The ArtifactID of the workspace used to retrieve a list of all users. Use -1 to retrieve users from the admin-level context.

includeDeleted.name: includeDeleted
includeDeleted.description: [Optional - Default false] Include Users flagged as deleted in the results

includeCurrentUser.name: includeCurrentUser
includeCurrentUser.description: [Optional - Default true] Include the current user in the results; False would be for instances like coding docs

enforceChoiceLimitForUI.name: enforceChoiceLimitForUI
enforceChoiceLimitForUI.description: If the list exceeds configured limit of users, no users will be returned.

tags.name: Relativity.Identity.Server.V1.Services.Interfaces.IFederatedInstanceManager
tags.description:
Connect this local Relativity instance to one or more remote Relativity instances for the
            purposes of navigation and data exchange.

tags.description: Web services for interacting with Authentication Provider Types

tags.name: Relativity.Identity.Server.V1.Services.Interfaces.IGroupManager
tags.description: Provides methods to interact with groups at the admin level

tags.name: Relativity.Identity.Server.V1.Services.Interfaces.ILoginProfileManager
tags.description: Service for managing login methods that are configured for individual users.
